title: pulmonaria longifolia
intro: Pulmonaria longifolia, also known as Lungwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Pulmonaria longifolia has been recognized for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and support the immune system. Pulmonaria longifolia can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
